message:
feat(queries,mail-ui): batch thread participant lookup and unified inbox pagination fix

- queries.rs: add batch_thread_participant_summaries() for fetching
  participant info across multiple threads in a single query,
  reducing N+1 queries in the unified inbox view
- mail_ui.rs: refactor unified inbox rendering to use batch
  participant lookups, fix pagination offset calculation, and
  improve thread metadata display consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
